answer:
Tull fled because Venters screamed the name "Lassiter," and Tull recognized that Lassiter was the infamous gunman who had come to Utah to avenge his sister. Tull feared Lassiter's reputation and did not want to confront him. Thus, the mere mention of Lassiter's name caused Tull to retreat in fear.

\boxed{\text{Tull fled because Venters screamed "Lassiter," and Tull recognized him as the infamous gunman he feared.}}
